description_long: This is a two-story wooden house with a weathered, blue-painted exterior and a shingled hip roof. The front facade features a covered porch with ornate white railings and columns, as well as four windows with decorative shutters and a central door. The left side of the house has a chimney and three windows, while the right side is mostly plain with a single window and a small attic dormer. The rear of the house includes a tall metal ladder leading to the roof and a side porch that wraps around. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, and the overall style suggests a blend of Victorian and vernacular architecture. The house appears aged, with visible wear on the paint and roof shingles.
description: A weathered, two-story blue wooden house with a shingled hip roof, ornate front porch, and asymmetrical windows. Features include a wraparound porch, chimney, and decorative shutters.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two windows with shutters, and a blue wooden facade with a shingled roof and chimney.
description_view_1: Rear view with a tall metal ladder, a single window, and the side porch extending along the right side.
description_view_2: Porch view highlighting the ornate white railings, four windows with shutters, and the main door beneath the covered porch.
description_view_3: Side view with a mostly plain blue wall, a small attic dormer, and the wraparound porch visible on the left.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a covered porch, ornate white railings, and decorative columns
